evals.expected_output: Runs style-maintain on alpha.yaml; output includes all 7 contract fields: fidelity metrics (N/M), SQI delta, authority basis, divergence statement, Code Opportunities table, QA verdict, research value rating.
assertions: Fidelity metrics in N/M format present (citations and bibliography)
SQI delta present (+N, -N, or ±0)
Authority basis stated (style guide / Citum policy / biblatex / citeproc / mixed)
Divergence field present (none, div-ID, or 'new adjudication required')
Code Opportunities table present with at least one row
Code Opportunities table Description column is not blank or all-dashes (real content or 'no opportunities observed')
QA verdict present (pass or fail with reason)
Research value rating present (high / medium / low)
Commit field present (short SHA + message, or 'none' if QA did not pass)
Routed-to sub-skill stated in output header

evals.expected_output: Identifies migrate mode from .csl path, routes to style-migrate-enhance, does not ask user to confirm mode.
assertions: Mode identified as migrate (not upgrade or create)
Output header states 'Routed to: style-migrate-enhance'
Did not ask user to confirm mode
Fidelity metrics in N/M format present
Code Opportunities table present with non-empty Description column

evals.expected_output: Even if no code opportunities found, the Co-Evolution table is present with at least a 'no opportunities observed' row — never omitted.
assertions: Code Opportunities table present
Table Description column contains real text (not blank or all-dashes) — 'no opportunities observed' is acceptable, bare dashes are not
Table has Description, Type, Action, Unlocks columns

evals.expected_output: Checks DIVERGENCE_REGISTER.md before classifying any oracle failure. Final output records exactly one of: 'applied divergence: div-XXX', 'no applicable divergence found', or 'new adjudication required'.
assertions: Divergence preflight evidenced in output (register checked before classifying failures)
Final output records exactly one divergence outcome: 'applied divergence', 'no applicable divergence found', or 'new adjudication required'
No oracle failure classified as a bug without a divergence register check

evals.expected_output: Completes full pipeline autonomously. Does not stop mid-task to ask questions. Commits automatically after QA pass. Does not end with 'what should I do next?'
assertions: Does not ask user for approval mid-task (outside explicit permission gates)
Commits automatically after QA pass
Final message does not end with an open-ended question to the user
